title: Lime Basil and Mandarin Wax Melts: 16 pcs Heart Shaped Wax Melts Scented with a Base of Essential Oils of Patchouli, Orange and Petitgrain, Candle Alternative
features: ❤️ POPULAR SCENT: Lift your senses and soothe your mind with the zesty romantic scent of Lime, calming basil and uplifting mandarin to fill your room with a delightful, calming aroma.
❤️ Spotless Leopard My Heart Wax Melts Lemon Lavender are handmade with soy wax - vegan friendly, pet friendly and plastic free
❤️ LONG LASTING: highly scented perfume wax melts - each heart wax melt lasts upto 6 hours. Contains 16 x 5g heart shaped melts. Upto 96 hours scent within this fragrance gift set
❤️ EASY TO USE: With any wax burner electric, scentsy plug in wax burner or oil burner & tea lights 8 hour. Depending on the size of your warmer can be burnt many times until the scent is gone.
❤️ WAX MELT GIFT SETS: Gift sets for mum, friend gifts for women, sleep gift sets for women, house warming gifts for family, a wardrobe scent, birthday gifts for friends or relaxation gifts
description: Product Description My Heart Melts - wax melts - Lime, Basil & Mandarin - Eco Box
